emotional_tone: Warm, Welcoming, Premium yet Homely, Nostalgic, Soulful

design_philosophy.core_concept: Nostalgia and emotional connection - 'Finally, I am home'. A DUAL IDENTITY brand serving authentic South Indian cuisine in Edinburgh & Glasgow.
design_philosophy.visual_aesthetic: Warm parchment textures, cultural props (brass vessels, clay pots, banana leaves), rich earthy tones. No flat SaaS looks. Uses organic shapes, subtle grain, and high-end editorial photography.

primary.name: Deep Burgundy
primary.usage: Header, Footer, Primary CTAs, Key Typography highlights

accent.name: Saffron Gold
accent.usage: Offers banners, Highlights, Active states, Subtle borders

prasada.name: Sree Prasada (Divine, Pure Vegetarian)
prasada.description: Turmeric Yellows, Fresh Banana Leaf Greens

svadista.name: Sree Svadista (Rustic, Spicy, Non-Vegetarian)
svadista.description: Deep Earthy Reds, Clay Pot Browns, Spice tones

typography.rules: Never center headings by default. Use 'font-bold' or 'font-black' for Playfair Display selectively. Lato body should be lightweight and highly readable.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24.
layout_and_spacing.container: Max-width 7xl with mx-auto and px-4 md:px-8 for standard sections.
layout_and_spacing.cards: Cardless or extremely subtle borders (border-[#F4C430]/30). No heavy drop shadows. Use soft ambient shadows like shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(128,0,32,0.05)].

notification_bar.style: bg-primary text-inverse text-sm py-2 text-center font-body
notification_bar.content: Swagatam! Now serving Edinburgh & Glasgow | Free Delivery over £30

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#F4C430]/20 text-primary

two_worlds_section.style: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 p-8 md:p-16
two_worlds_section.cards: Large immersive image cards with rich textual overlay. Prasada (Green/Yellow tint), Svadista (Red/Brown tint).

meal_moments.item_style: flex flex-col items-center gap-3 w-24 h-24 rounded-full border-2 border-accent/50 text-primary p-4 hover:bg-accent/10 transition-colors

dabba_wala_guide.steps: 3-step visual storytelling using vintage tiffin imagery and elegant typography.

icons.rules: Use for UI elements (cart, user, menu, arrows). No emojis allowed.

hero.description: Delicious indian meal served on a platter. Use for 'Welcome Home' slide.
South Indian biryani on banana leaf. Use for 'Dual Kitchen' slide.
Vintage metal tiffin carrier. Use for 'Dabba Wala' slide.

worlds.description: Indian thalis with rice. Use for Sree Prasada (Vegetarian) card.
Delicious chicken biryani in traditional clay pot. Use for Sree Svadista (Non-Vegetarian) card.

features.description: Elderly hands grinding spices. Use for Our Story / Spices section.
People cooking in kitchen. Use as thumbnail for Svadista Cinema.
Delicious rice dish in clay bowl. Use for Chef's Special or Trending.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Deep Burgundy (#800020) and Muted Ivory (#FDFBF7) color scheme.
Implement 'Playfair Display' for headings and 'Lato' for body text. Apply 'tracking-tight' to large headings.
Use Lucide React for all icons. Emojis are strictly forbidden.
Build a sticky header with a notification bar at the very top.
Implement the hero section as a slider (e.g., using Framer Motion or Swiper) with 3 distinct slides and the provided images.
Create the 'Two Worlds' section as highly immersive, emotional cards mapping to the Prasada and Svadista aesthetics.
Ensure all interactive elements have a 'data-testid' attribute.
Design for Mobile First. Generous spacing and padding are critical to the premium feel.
For the 'Svadista Cinema' section, create a beautiful overlay over the cooking image with a prominent Play button (lucide-react).
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layout to maintain creative freedom, using Shadcn only for complex interactive components if necessary (like Carousels or Dialogs).
